summary: Linked the NameTag interface unit by matching `un_802FD4C8`, flipping `src/melee/if/ifnametag.c` from NonMatching to Matching, and cleaning GALE01 symbol names/scopes for local NameTag data and constants. The source match used small codegen-oriented rewrites around GObj creation, camera object setup, and memzero sizing. The decomp-dev report confirmed one new match in `main/melee/if/ifnametag`, with `un_802FD4C8` going from 90.18% to 100.00%.

key_files.role: Matched-source edits for `un_802FD4C8`, including an inline GObj creation helper and explicit camera object temporary.
Updated symbol scopes and names needed for linking: local NameTag callback/data, compiler-style local constants, and section labels.

what_changed: `ifnametag.c` was moved into the Matching object list in `configure.py`.

`un_802FD4C8` was adjusted to match: added `inline HSD_GObj* un_802FD4C8_inline(int arg0)` returning `GObj_Create(0xE, arg0, 0)`, introduced `HSD_CObj* new_var`, assigned the memzero size through `i`, and split the nested `lb_80013B14` call before `HSD_GObjObject_80390A70`.
NameTag camera-related data was renamed/localized from address-style symbols to `nametag_eyepos`, `nametag_interest`, and `nametag_CObjDesc`.
Several data/sdata/sdata2 constants were converted from global `un_...` or `lbl_...` names to local compiler-style `@NNN` labels, including string, float, and double constants.
Local section labels `...data.0` and `...bss.0` were added at existing data/bss addresses.
The bot report recorded +316 matched code bytes, +3152 linked code bytes, +429 linked data bytes, and one new match for `main/melee/if/ifnametag`.
smart_moves: Kept the behavioral change surface tiny: the source edits are mostly expression-shape and temporary-variable changes intended to affect generated code rather than logic.
Used an inline wrapper for `GObj_Create(0xE, arg0, 0)` to preserve semantics while altering the call shape enough to match `un_802FD4C8`.

Split `lb_80013B14((HSD_CameraDescPerspective*) (&nametag_CObjDesc))` into a named `HSD_CObj* new_var` before passing it to `HSD_GObjObject_80390A70`, a common way to control evaluation order and register lifetimes.
Made the link flip and symbol cleanup in the same PR, so the newly Matching object had matching source and matching symbol visibility/data labels.
Localized symbols that are not intended as public globals, reducing symbol-table noise while preserving useful names for identified NameTag camera data.
decomp_lessons: When linking a previously NonMatching file, update both `configure.py` and `config/GALE01/symbols.txt`; source matching alone may not be enough if symbol scope or local labels are wrong.

For small remaining mismatches, try expression-level MWCC tactics before larger rewrites: inline helpers, explicit temporaries, assignment expressions inside arguments, and literal enum values can change codegen without changing behavior.
Use descriptive local names for identified module data such as `nametag_CObjDesc`, but keep unidentified compiler-generated constants as local `@NNN` labels.
If a symbol is only needed inside the object, mark it `scope:local`; this PR did that for `NameTag_RenderCallback` and multiple NameTag-related data symbols.
Automated decomp-dev progress comments are useful evidence for link PRs: here they confirmed the exact newly matched item and global linked-code/data deltas.
naming_conventions: NameTag callback naming uses `NameTag_` CamelCase, as in `NameTag_RenderCallback`, even though this PR made the symbol local.
Identified NameTag data uses a lowercase `nametag_` prefix: `nametag_eyepos`, `nametag_interest`, `nametag_CObjDesc`.
`CObj` capitalization is preserved inside `nametag_CObjDesc`, matching HSD camera object terminology.
Unidentified local constants use compiler-style `@NNN` names such as `@197`, `@263`, `@322`, and `@380`.
Local section anchor labels use dotted names such as `...data.0` and `...bss.0`.
Unknown global symbols remain address-style `un_80...` names when the diff does not identify a better semantic name.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Replaced direct `GObj_Create(HSD_GOBJ_CLASS_UI, 15, 0)` with `un_802FD4C8_inline(15)`, where the inline helper calls `GObj_Create(0xE, arg0, 0)`.
Introduced `HSD_CObj* new_var` to hold the result of `lb_80013B14` before the `HSD_GObjObject_80390A70` call.

Changed `memzero(un_804D6D70, sizeof(un_804D6D70))` to `memzero(un_804D6D70, i = sizeof(un_804D6D70))`, likely to match register/assignment side effects; the exact compiler reason is not documented in comments.
Kept `PAD_STACK(0x10)` and the surrounding control flow intact, indicating the match was achieved through local codegen nudges rather than algorithm changes.
Symbol-map matching included converting global-looking constants to local `@NNN` labels with correct section, size, alignment, and data type metadata.

review_feedback.feedback: GALE01 report showed matched code 61.59% (+0.01%, +316 bytes), linked code 33.82% (+0.08%, +3152 bytes), linked data 32.36% (+0.04%, +429 bytes), and one new match: `main/melee/if/ifnametag` `un_802FD4C8` from 90.18% to 100.00%.
No human review comments or review records were present in the slice.
